title: Principal Instructional Designer at Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises:
Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises!
